_raw:
action render
CALL @items, dget, "workers.items"
CALL @draft, dget, "workers.draft_url"
CALL _, clear, "workers"
CALL _, zone_clear, "workers"
CALL _, write, "workers", 0, 1, "WORKERS", "c-accent"
CALL _, zone, "workers", 2, 1, 26, 1, "input", "workers_add", "", "workers.draft_url"
CALL _, write, "workers", 2, 1, @draft, ""
CALL _, zone, "workers", 2, 28, 3, 1, "button", "workers_add"
CALL _, write, "workers", 2, 28, " + ", "c-green"
EACH @w, @items, +8
CALL @row, add, 4, @each_idx
CALL @dot_cl, status_color, @w.status
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 1, "●", @dot_cl
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 3, @w.url, ""
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 25, @w.role, "c-accent2"
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 31, "×", "c-red"
CALL _, zone, "workers", @row, 1, 1, 1, "button", "workers_probe", @each_idx
CALL _, zone, "workers", @row, 31, 1, 1, "button", "workers_del", @each_idx
end
name: render
asm:
CALL @items, dget, "workers.items"
CALL @draft, dget, "workers.draft_url"
CALL _, clear, "workers"
CALL _, zone_clear, "workers"
CALL _, write, "workers", 0, 1, "WORKERS", "c-accent"
CALL _, zone, "workers", 2, 1, 26, 1, "input", "workers_add", "", "workers.draft_url"
CALL _, write, "workers", 2, 1, @draft, ""
CALL _, zone, "workers", 2, 28, 3, 1, "button", "workers_add"
CALL _, write, "workers", 2, 28, " + ", "c-green"
EACH @w, @items, +8
CALL @row, add, 4, @each_idx
CALL @dot_cl, status_color, @w.status
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 1, "●", @dot_cl
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 3, @w.url, ""
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 25, @w.role, "c-accent2"
CALL _, write, "workers", @row, 31, "×", "c-red"
CALL _, zone, "workers", @row, 1, 1, 1, "button", "workers_probe", @each_idx
CALL _, zone, "workers", @row, 31, 1, 1, "button", "workers_del", @each_idx

_raw:
action workers_add
CALL @url, dget, "workers.draft_url"
CMP @empty, eq, @url, ""
JIF @empty, :done
CALL @items, dget, "workers.items"
CALL @probe_url, concat, @url, "/v1/models"
CALL @r, http, "GET", @probe_url, "", 3000
CALL @ok, get, @r, "ok"
CMP @is_ok, eq, @ok, true
JIF @is_ok, :status_ok
MOV @status, "fail"
JIF true, :status_done
:status_ok
MOV @status, "ok"
:status_done
MOV @w, {}
CALL _, set, @w, "url", @url
CALL _, set, @w, "role", "gen"
CALL _, set, @w, "status", @status
CALL _, push, @items, @w
CALL _, dset, "workers.items", @items
CALL _, dsave, "workers", @items
CALL _, input_clear, "workers.draft_url"
CALL _, log, "added worker"
CALL _, render, "workers"
:done
end
name: workers_add
asm:

CALL @r, http, "GET", @probe_url, "", 3000
CALL @ok, get, @r, "ok"
CMP @is_ok, eq, @ok, true
JIF @is_ok, :status_ok
MOV @status, "fail"

:status_ok

_raw:
action workers_del
CALL @items, dget, "workers.items"
CALL _, splice, @items, @action_data, 1
CALL _, dset, "workers.items", @items
CALL _, dsave, "workers", @items
CALL _, log, "removed worker"
CALL _, render, "workers"
end
name: workers_del
asm:
CALL @items, dget, "workers.items"
CALL _, splice, @items, @action_data, 1
CALL _, dset, "workers.items", @items
CALL _, dsave, "workers", @items
CALL _, log, "removed worker"
CALL _, render, "workers"

_raw:
action workers_probe
CALL @items, dget, "workers.items"
CALL @w, get, @items, @action_data
CALL @url, get, @w, "url"
CALL @probe_url, concat, @url, "/v1/models"
CALL _, log, @probe_url
CALL @r, http, "GET", @probe_url, "", 3000
CALL @ok, get, @r, "ok"
CMP @status_val, eq, @ok, true
JIF @status_val, :probe_ok
MOV @st, "fail"
JIF true, :probe_done
:probe_ok
MOV @st, "ok"
:probe_done
CALL _, set, @w, "status", @st
CALL _, dset, "workers.items", @items
CALL _, dsave, "workers", @items
CALL _, log, @st
CALL _, render, "workers"
end
